candidates.why: Exact balance sheet label for total current assets; matches ACT definition directly.
Non-current assets, not current assets, so not suitable for ACT.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance sheet label for cash and cash equivalents; best match for CHE.
May be a cash subline, but the explicit cash and cash equivalents total exists and is preferred.
Cash flow reconciliation line, not balance sheet CHE when a balance sheet line exists.
Cash flow period-beginning amount, not CHE on balance sheet date.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash total, not cash flow reconciliation lines.

candidates.why: Exact total current liabilities line; best match for LCT.
This appears to be a component/subline within payables rather than the total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best available reported total for short-term interest-bearing debt; includes current borrowings but likely also lease current portion, so definition fit is imperfect.
Represents current borrowings from banks and excludes lease liabilities; may understate STD if other current debt exists outside bank loans.
Exact intended label, but values are blank in preview; still semantically the cleanest if populated elsewhere.

variables.notes: Chose the exact shortlisted STD total label. It is semantically best and may be populated outside the preview. Avoided 'Current interest-bearing liabilities' because it appears to include lease liabilities, which should be excluded in baseline STD.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable.
Direct balance sheet PPE total/net line; preferred over gross components.
Only a component of PPE and gross, not total PPE.
Cash flow line, not balance sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Preferred total/net PPE line on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line; direct match for AT.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Cash flow from investing activities
candidates.why: Despite the concatenated label, values behave like the net cash flow from operating activities line and it is the closest direct total CFO/OANCF row.

candidates.row_label: Adjustments to cash flow from operating activities
candidates.why: Only an adjustment subtotal, not net operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Cash flow from investing activities

variables.notes: Selected the apparent net operating cash flow total. The label is concatenated with the next section header, but the amounts clearly represent operating cash flow.
